params.prompt: Vertical 9:16 premium natural-history source plate, one realistic great horned owl perched on a simple mossy branch at dusk, body facing the camera, head turned far over its right shoulder in a believable owl head-turn pose, huge bright eyes still visible, clean silhouette between head and body, dramatic but kid-safe wildlife documentary lighting, shallow forest background with dark green bokeh, clear caption-safe negative space at top and bottom, no text, no logo, no watermark, no UI, no labels, no arrows, no anatomy cutaway, no x-ray, no skeleton, no extra owls, no duplicate heads, no broken neck, no horror.
